skill.name: telegram-mini-app
skill.description: Expert in building Telegram Mini Apps (TWA) - web apps that run inside Telegram with native-like experience. Covers the TON ecosystem, Telegram Web App API, payments, user authentication, and blockchain integration.
skill.summary: Build native-feeling web applications inside Telegram for 800M+ users with TON blockchain and payment integration.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 41 patterns that are all false positives. The skill file (SKILL.md) is documentation-only markdown containing code examples. Backticks are markdown code fences, not shell execution. URLs are official Telegram SDK links or documentation placeholders. No executable code or security risks present.

content.user_title: Build Telegram Mini Apps with TON Integration
content.value_statement: Create native-feeling web applications that run inside Telegram for 800M+ users. Integrate TON blockchain, payments, and viral mechanics without leaving the Telegram ecosystem.
actual_capabilities: Design Mini App architecture using Telegram Web App API
Integrate TON Connect for wallet connections and blockchain transactions
Implement in-app payments using Telegram Stars and TON
Build viral referral mechanics and gamification features
Create mobile-first responsive UI matching Telegram theme
limitations: Requires Telegram bot as entry point for Mini App distribution
TON Connect integration needs manifest file hosted on HTTPS domain
Mini Apps run in webview with Telegram API constraints
Payment processing limited to Telegram Stars and TON cryptocurrency

use_cases.title: Web3 Gaming Mini App
use_cases.description: Build a play-to-earn game with TON wallet integration, NFT rewards, and viral referral mechanics that spreads through Telegram shares.
use_cases.target_user: Blockchain game developers targeting Telegram's 800M users

use_cases.title: E-commerce Storefront
use_cases.description: Create a shoppable Mini App with Telegram Stars payments, order tracking, and seamless checkout inside the Telegram interface.
use_cases.target_user: Small businesses selling directly through Telegram channels

use_cases.title: Community Engagement Tool
use_cases.description: Develop a gamified loyalty app with daily rewards, streaks, leaderboards, and achievement badges to boost channel engagement.
use_cases.target_user: Telegram channel admins and community managers

prompt_templates.title: Basic Mini App Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a Telegram Mini App HTML template with proper viewport settings, Telegram Web App SDK initialization, and user data extraction from initDataUnsafe.
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new Mini App project from scratch

prompt_templates.title: React Mini App with Hooks
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a React hook for Telegram Web App integration that exposes user data, query ID, and core methods like expand, close, and ready with proper TypeScript types.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a Mini App using React framework

prompt_templates.title: TON Wallet Integration
prompt_templates.prompt: Implement TON Connect wallet integration for a React Mini App including the UI provider wrapper, connection button component, and manifest file configuration.
prompt_templates.scenario: Adding cryptocurrency wallet connection to Web3 Mini App

prompt_templates.title: Payment and Transaction Flow
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a payment button component that sends TON transactions using tonConnectUI, handles nanoton conversion, and sets transaction validity windows.
prompt_templates.scenario: Implementing cryptocurrency payments in a Mini App

output_examples.input: Set up a basic Telegram Mini App with user greeting
output_examples.output: HTML page with Telegram SDK loaded, user first name displayed using initDataUnsafe.user, main button configured with Telegram theme colors

output_examples.input: Add TON wallet connection to existing Mini App
output_examples.output: TonConnectUIProvider wrapping app, TonConnectButton component in header, manifest.json with app metadata, wallet address accessible after connection

best_practices: Always validate initData using Telegram's HMAC verification on your backend before trusting user identity
Match Telegram theme using themeParams CSS variables for seamless native feel
Design mobile-first with touch targets minimum 44px and test on actual devices
anti_patterns: Ignoring Telegram theme parameters resulting in jarring visual transitions
Designing for desktop when 95 percent of Telegram usage is mobile
Skipping loading states which makes users think the app is broken

faq.question: How do users discover my Mini App?
faq.answer: Mini Apps are accessed through bot commands, inline buttons, or direct links. Users can also find them via Telegram's Mini Apps directory once published.

faq.question: Can I use my existing web app as a Mini App?
faq.answer: Yes, but you must integrate the Telegram Web App SDK and adapt your UI to match Telegram theme. Mobile-first responsive design is essential.

faq.question: What is TON Connect and do I need it?
faq.answer: TON Connect is a protocol for connecting TON wallets to Mini Apps. You only need it if your app requires blockchain transactions or crypto payments.

faq.question: How do Telegram Stars payments work?
faq.answer: Telegram Stars is Telegram's virtual currency. Users buy Stars, then spend them in Mini Apps. Developers withdraw earnings as TON cryptocurrency.

faq.question: Can Mini Apps access user data without permission?
faq.answer: No. User data comes from initDataUnsafe which Telegram provides only when the user opens your Mini App. Always verify this data on your backend.

faq.question: Do I need to host my Mini App on specific servers?
faq.answer: Any HTTPS-hosted web app works. Telegram does not require specific hosting. However, TON Connect requires a valid HTTPS domain for the manifest file.
